roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S NON-OPP DEF'S PC1473,7 MOT SET ASIDE GUILTY PLEA & VACATE CONV FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION, P & A, DEC FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/INTC/X: APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT IS DEPUTY PUBLIC DEFENDER FRANCISCO EUGARTE,/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 02-15-11 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA TO A VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11355, ENTERED 02-15-11, IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/MO PC 1385:IN THEINTEREST OF JUSTICE/NUNCDAT: 02-15-11/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
/CAL:PRELIM HEARING/AMEND:002/X:COUNT 2 IS AMENDED AS MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 02-16-11/987,2/BAIL:30,000/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 02-03-11/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-15-11/DOP
